DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GANDHI, DIPAK

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF DIPAK GANDHI'S AND MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT 1) ENJOINED FROM INTERFERING WITH PLAINTIFF'S TENANCY IN ANY WAY OTHER THAN PROCEEDING WITH UNLAWFUL DETAINER, 2) SHOULD REMIT ALL RENTS TO PLAINTIFF IF ANY COLLECTED OR RECEIVED FROM TENANTS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. SMITH, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Chelsea Whelan (415-931-4204) of Law Office of Michael Heath for Dipak Gandhi, plaintiff and moving party; No other appearance

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF DIPAK GANDHI's And Motion For Preliminary Injunction is granted. Defendant 1) Enjoined from interfering with plaintiff's tenancy in any way other than proceeding with unlawful detainer, 2) Should remit all rents to plaintiff if any collected or received from tenants. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)
